name: Centaur Warrunner
description: It is not pride I take in my own power, it is passion. Bradwarden, the Centaur Warrunner

abilities.name: Horsepower
abilities.description: Grants flat bonus movement speed per current and increases the self max movement speed cap.

abilities.name: Hoof Stomp
abilities.description: After a brief windup, Centaur slams the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemy units. Centaur can move and is not disarmed during the delay.

abilities.name: Double Edge
abilities.description: Strikes a mighty blow at melee range, damaging both himself and a small area around the target. Deals extra damage based on Centaur's. deals additional damage equal to a percentage of the incoming damage taken previously. The damage counter resets upon cast.

abilities.name: Retaliate
abilities.description: Counters all attacks, and returns a fixed damage amount plus a percentage based on Centaur's. Applies its ability effects on the attack before the source disables the ability.

abilities.name: Work Horse
abilities.description: Acquiring this ability does not grant the.

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.description: Trampled enemies take damage based on Centaur's. Each enemy can be trampled and slowed once.
